judge_calls.reasoning: Positive items: accurate OCF ($17.5B) +13%, breakeven revenue ($42.6B) +10%, NAND reduction 10% +9%, HBM packaging capex +6%, structural argument for discipline +7%. Total positive 45%. Subtotal 45/100. Deductions: incorrect mathematical calculations (used gross capex instead of net, wrong FCF and coverage ratio) -4%. Net 41/100 = 0.41. Items 2,3,4 not earned due to incorrect data; items 7,9,10 not addressed.
